questions.question: Peter says believers have been born again into what kind of hope?
options: A living hope through Christ's resurrection
A hope based on the law
questions.correct: A living hope through Christ's resurrection
questions.feedback: God has given us new birth into a living hope through the resurrection of Jesus Christ.

questions.question: Peter says faith is tested by fire so that it may result in what?
options: Praise, glory, and honor at Christ's return
questions.correct: Praise, glory, and honor at Christ's return
questions.feedback: Tested faith results in praise, glory, and honor when Jesus Christ is revealed.

questions.question: Peter says believers were redeemed with perishable things like silver or gold.
questions.feedback: They were redeemed not with perishable things but with the precious blood of Christ.

questions.question: Be holy because I am _____.
questions.feedback: Be holy because God is holy.

questions.question: All people are like grass and their glory is like the flowers of the field; the grass withers and the flowers fall, but the word of the Lord endures _____.
questions.feedback: The word of the Lord endures forever.
